title: Daily Briefing — 2026-03-25
description:

  The Diary Of A CEO: David Sinclair: Can Aging Be Reversed? After 8 Weeks, Cells Appeared 75% Younger In Tests! (9/10)

  The knowledge project: [Outliers] Harrison McCain: How to Create Demand for Something Nobody Wants (8/10)
  Manager Tools: Top Ten Hiring Mistakes - #7 - Being Swayed (9/10)
  The Peter Attia Drive: #385 - AMA #82: Applying the tools of longevity in the real world: disease prevention, DEXA scans, artificial sweeteners, injury recovery, stability training, habit formation, protein intake and mTOR activation, and more (9/10)
